data.body: USER_DECISION (2026-04-20): NOT approved as a bug fix — scope exceeds bug-fix (3-layer architectural change to ticket-lib concurrency model). Recommended next step: convert to epic covering (a) retry on non-rebase-error with sentinel .push-pending, (b) session-end drain, (c) collapse bidirectional relates_to writes. Leaving ticket open pending epic creation.
